series_metadata.series_title: Reimbursing Negotiable Security and Surety Bond Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains, but is not limited to, Reimbursing Employer Application, Treasurer of State receipts and release correspondence, inventory of securities with Treasurer of State, Reimbursing Employer Surety Bonds and related Continuation Certificates, Riders, Power of Attorney and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for 2.5 years of inactivity subsequent to the effective discontinuance date and upon the proper disposition of all debits and the security instrument, image and certify, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in the System until enterprise for which account was established is no longer in operation and its account has not been chargeable for a period of 7 years, and there are no outstanding debts, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
